ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "token" TEXT /* API token generated for the user */,
  "org_structure_id" TEXT /* Organization structure ID associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (foreign key to user_roles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the token belongs */,
  "token" TEXT /* API token string */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was generated */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last token usage */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the token has been revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of the response requested by the user */,
  "api_version" TEXT /* Version of the API used for the request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the request was made */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request (in milliseconds) */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_api_version FOREIGN KEY ("api_version") REFERENCES api_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_response_format FOREIGN KEY ("response_format") REFERENCES response_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the API */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "deprecated_on" TEXT /* Date when the version was deprecated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the response format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event being logged (e.g., API access, token generation) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the API */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the API was accessed */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request (in milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error occurrence */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the error occurred */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_errors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
